raw_text: Utter garbage delivery estimates - it says 20 minutes, out for delivery and then delivery person is stuck in same place for 10 minutes without moving. Inevitably, order gets delayed, even if it's the middle of night (no traffic at all). Why can't you make the estimate more accurate?

I had placed an order on Blinkit, but the delivery partner was extremely rude. He refused to bring the order up to my flat. If I had to come downstairs myself, I could have just bought the items from a nearby shop. When it’s called home delivery, this kind of behavior is unacceptable. In the end, he simply left the order in the lift and walked away. Even customer support didn’t help or listen properly. After this third-class experience, I have uninstalled Blinkit.

Scam company always debiting money and never refunding money pura scam company do not order from this app. they say it will be refunded within 3-4 bsss days after 3-4bss days even your orders will be deleted . 0 star they do not even deserve 1 star. scammers. it's already been a month till now I have not received any refund back for a last order and also my 2nd order no refund the worst Customer service ever cannot provide any resolution. Scammers I would recommend not to use this app

worst experience. My friend ordered 3 items from blinkit for me ,order get conformed and they gave us 28 minutes waiting time . I was waiting for the order but 1st they delayed the order but I was waiting, after few minutes they cancelled my order. They don't care about customer time and they also told that refund will be transferred to my upi in next 5 days now I don't trust on blinkit.

Blinkit is a wonderful and incredibly helpful app. Their service is absolutely amazing. It has made my life so much better, and it truly delivers super fast within 5 to 10 minutes. I love Blinkit, and you have made my life so easy! Every time I order, the products are fresh, properly packed, and delivered right to my doorstep without any hassle. It is the most reliable grocery app I have ever used. Thank you for this brilliant service!""I am highly impressed with Blinkit. It is a fantastic ☺️💝✨

this is a great app. incredible fast delivery, good customer support, great design. although there is a problem which are the delivery partners, they either refuse doorstep delivery or climb 1 flights of stairs, I have a medical issue due to which im told to not climb stairs much yet they stay stubborn and give excuses like they are not allowed to climb stairs and stay seated at their bike. i don't know the rules of the company but I'm pretty sure it's advertised as doorstep delivery

when refund is not working. no option of contacting the customer care and inquiring about return and refund issues. after sending email to the mentioned email address the status of refund is updated as complete on the app. but refund is not recieved. If refund process is such difficult then I am not using this in future. who wants to loose a peace of mind over such things. atleast ensure hassle free refund process. these issues are raised by many others well.

poor service & so many call delivery person no response after same time delivery person asking cancel your order am shocking. delivery person asking wrong location mention I am call again and asking please check please check location is correct bilnkit call center no response. next time not use bilnkit app

I would like to appreciate the excellent service provided by Blinkit. My order was delivered quickly, the items were fresh and well-packed, and the overall experience was smooth and hassle-free. The delivery partner was polite and professional. Thank you for consistently providing reliable and convenient service. Keep up the great work!
I have booked five items, one item was not available, you have diliver only four items and I have make the payment for five items. please refund the amount of non available items.

Worst customer service, i have ordered an agaro kettle where the lid is missing , but i didn't receive any proper response from customer service. They only insist me contact the seller. No response from the customer service. worst decision to buy products in this platform. No proper response.
First Blinkit order and it arrived within 10 minutes! 🚀 Great prices, amazing convenience, and truly impressive service. Definitely a game-changer for quick shopping!"

Hi, I recently placed an order for two tender coconuts. Unfortunately, while one was fine, the second one was completely empty and had no water inside. I would like a refund or a replacement for the faulty item. Please look into this.

Good service but not compared to others.Most products go out of stock in minutes after adding to cart.Very less warehouses ,requires 20minutes time to reach my location.Some major products not available.Prices are high compared to zepto,Instamart etc.Zepto and Instamart also let you add 1 item for 1rupee on shopping for a specific amount but blinkit doesn't.

The delivery person is very unprofessional and ask for extra charges, by claiming that the company has asked them to do so. The delivery persons involved in this require proper manners and training yet to be learned. Hence, giving it 1 star only. Highly disappointed.

bad experience ordering from blinkit. I had ordered 4 pieces, classmate A4 Notebook of 240 pages each priced 100 Rs, and received notebook each 60-65 rs, of 172 pages, after contacting customer care also, on on notebook was replaced again that was of 160 pages, and in return took all 4 notebook. and still the issue didn't get resolved. my order was of 400 Rs and received of 260 Rs, no refund.

Very disappointing experience with [Blinkit]. Sometimes they deliver extremely poor-quality products, and when a complaint is raised, neither replacement nor refund is provided properly. The customer support executives were rude and ill-mannered instead of helping resolve the issue. Delivery agents are generally good, but the overall customer service experience has been very unsatisfactory. I ho

★☆☆☆☆ Don't use this app if you expect reliable customer support. I ordered Hammer Ultrapods from Blinkit, but the product I received did not match the specifications mentioned on the packaging. Instead of taking responsibility and resolving the issue, Blinkit rejected my complaint and directed me to contact the manufacturer. The seller was Blinkit, yet they failed to provide a proper solution. It has been more than 48 hours, and I am still struggling to get a satisfactory resolution. Custome

I've made a payment but it shows that payment failed and the amount is deducted and even every time i order i don't even get the coupons like one of my friend gets why soo i can't even apply for the coupon which are totally useless worse app I've ever seen

Ordered from Blinkit and honestly this was one of the worst experiences. Order arrived ridiculously late, like what’s the point of “quick delivery” then? Customer service is basically non-existent — zero help, zero accountability. And on top of that, they just keep adding extra charges for everything. And don’t even get me started on that useless chatbot… completely frustrating and doesn’t solve anything. If this is the service, it’s just not worth it.
